creator: hg@cally.queue.to
text:
Would the maintainer please consider updating to the 3.6.23.1 sqlite3
release touted at http://www.sqlite3.org ?  


Our sysutils/bacula-bat port triggers the bug noted 
at http://www.sqlite.org/src/info/f74beaabde with the sqlite3.6.19 that's 
in our databases/sqlite3 now.  Thank you!
